news.headline: US elevator manufacturing industry analysis for 2024-2029 mentions top players like Schindler, Otis, One, TK Elevator.
news.summary: A new report titled "Elevator Manufacturing in the US - Market Size, Industry Analysis, Trends and Forecasts (2024-2029)" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides insights into the scope, size, trends, and growth of the elevator manufacturing industry in the United States. It includes key sensitivities, success factors, five-year industry forecasts, growth rates, and an analysis of industry players along with their market shares. The Elevator Manufacturing industry in the US encompasses a diverse range of companies.

news.headline: Stellantis purchases more shares in third week of August 2024.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached over 10,000 in the past 24 hours. The total number of active cases currently stands at 75,000 with 1,500 patients in critical condition. Additionally, the death toll has climbed to 500. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety measures and get vaccinated to control the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter restrictions to combat the surge in cases. Stay updated for further developments.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana experienced significant pullbacks of 33%, 38%, and 45% respectively. Market expected to move upwards due to funding rates reset and liquidation of major supply overhangs. Industry researcher Michael Nadeau remains optimistic.
news.summary: Market researcher and founder of DeFi Report, Michael Nadeau, recently expressed optimism following a market correction. Nadeau highlighted significant pullbacks in key cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin dropping by 33%, Ethereum by 38%, and Solana by 45%. Despite this, Nadeau believes there are signs pointing towards a potential upward movement in the market. A key development is the resetting of funding rates and the reduction of major supply overhangs, such as sales by the German government and unwinding positions of entities like Mt. Gox and FTX creditors. Long-term holders are said to be re-entering the market, suggesting a positive shift in sentiment.

news.headline: Athabasca Oil closes C$200 million unsecured notes offering; 6.75% senior notes due Aug 9, 2029.
news.summary: Athabasca Oil Corporation, based in Calgary, Alberta, revealed the closure of its private placement offering. The company successfully sold $200 million in total principal amount of 6.75% senior unsecured notes. These notes are set to mature on August 9, 2029, providing investors with a long-term investment opportunity.

news.headline: Bollore discloses details of share buyback program, offering availability for investors to participate.
Kentucky Distillers’ Association has joined World Spirits Alliance for more collaboration. #BourbonBuildsKentucky
news.summary: The Kentucky-based organization known as KDA has recently become a member of the World Spirits Alliance, marking a significant milestone in the world of bourbon. This move signifies a shift towards greater cooperation with other prominent figures in the global spirits industry.

news.headline: California teams up with NVIDIA to boost AI education for students and educators, providing generative AI skills to colleges.
news.summary: California recently revealed a new educational initiative in partnership with NVIDIA, focused on providing universities and community colleges with training in generative artificial intelligence. This program is aimed at enhancing skills related to AI technology, with the goal of preparing students for the evolving job market. The initiative involves a substantial investment to support educational institutions in California in incorporating AI training into their curriculum. By collaborating with NVIDIA on this endeavor, California is emphasizing the importance of equipping students with AI knowledge to meet industry demands.

news.headline: Big Lots celebrates National Bargain Hunting Week with savings, survey shows 85% bargain shop for thrill, 62% find it therapeutic.
news.summary: A recent survey revealed that bargain shopping offers more benefits than just saving money. 85% of respondents shared that they engage in bargain shopping for the excitement of discovering deals, while 62% find it to be a therapeutic activity. The survey was conducted in Columbus, Ohio, and coincides with National Bargain Hunting Week, taking place from August 12th to 18th. The study was conducted by Big Lots, Inc. (NYSE), a renowned retail company.

news.headline: Ademi LLP investigates if Iteris, Inc. provided a fair price to shareholders in its transaction with Almaviva. Contact for info.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Milwaukee-based law firm Ademi LLP announced an investigation into Iteris (NASDAQ: ITI) concerning potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations related to its dealings with Almaviva. Individuals interested in participating in the investigation can find more information at https://www.ademilaw.com/case/iteris-inc or by contacting the firm at [phone number].

news.headline: Analyst recommends selling amid rally in Lumen's high-yield bonds and stock.
FDA approves neffy (epinephrine nasal spray) for anaphylaxis. First of its kind for Type I reactions in adults/children.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland, on August 9, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval for neffy (epinephrine nasal spray) for addressing allergic reactions, notably Type I responses such as life-threatening anaphylaxis. The approval extends to usage in both adult and pediatric patients.

news.headline: Global gasket materials market for vibration control to reach US$19.8 billion by 2034, growing at 4.0% CAGR from 2024.
news.summary: The global gasket materials market for vibration control was valued at $12.8 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach $19.8 billion by 2034, with a projected 4% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) between 2024 and 2034. The market is witnessing growth due to increased industrial focus on system performance enhancement. These gasket materials are crucial in minimizing vibrations, ensuring smoother operations, and extending machinery lifespan. The demand for HVAC systems in the construction sector is a significant market driver, with vibration-dampening gasket materials playing a vital role in such systems. Advancements in material science have led to the development of superior gasket materials like elastomers and foams, offering enhanced vibration attenuation properties. The automotive industry is also a key contributor to market growth. The construction boom in emerging economies and the need for reliable vibration control in complex systems are driving the demand for these gasket materials, which are crucial for high-demand applications in various industries.

news.headline: Cargotec Corporation to repurchase shares on 9.8.2024. #stockmarket #finance
Pure Aesthetics Medical Spa named #27 among Best Companies to Work For in Florida by Florida Trend magazine.
news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida on August 8, 2024, Pure Aesthetics Medical Spa has been honored as one of Florida's top companies to work for by Florida Trend magazine, securing the 27th position in the rankings. This accolade highlights the company's dedication to cultivating a positive work environment and recognizing its employees.

news.headline: Trump’s tax plan may increase national debt; Harris's fiscal policy remains unclear. Tax cuts lose more revenue than tariffs.
news.summary: The proposed tax cuts by the ex-president could result in a substantial loss of revenue compared to the revenue increase from his tariff hikes. The vice president has not yet provided a comprehensive explanation of fiscal policy.

news.headline: Nova Scotia school support staff to release report on violence in public schools, launching safety campaign. Chair of NSSBCU, Nelson Scott, aims to raise awareness.
news.summary: In Nova Scotia, school support staff are preparing to unveil a new report addressing violence in public schools and launching a campaign to tackle workplace violence and ensure the safety of staff and students. The Nova Scotia School Board Council of Unions (NSSBCU) Chairman, Nelson Scott, emphasized the importance of showcasing the daily challenges faced in public schools to raise awareness among Nova Scotians. As another school year looms, the report aims to shed light on the prevalent issue and initiate action to safeguard school environments.

news.headline: 1,600 Teamsters nurses at Rady Children's Hospital filed intent to strike for fair contract in San Diego.
news.summary: Approximately 1,600 nurses at the Children's Hospital in San Diego have been compelled to resume their strike, as they persist in their pursuit for a just contract. The Executive Director of United Nurses of Children's Hospital (UNOCH) Teamsters Local 1699, Katie Langenstrass, issued a statement on August 9, 2024, regarding this development.

news.headline: Reunion partners with Summit Ridge Energy to sell $40 million in tax credits for community solar projects.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in San Francisco, a prominent clean energy finance firm named Reunion revealed a partnership with Summit Ridge Energy, the top commercial solar company in the US. The collaboration involved the sale of around $40 million worth of transferable tax credits from a specific initiative.

news.headline: Dubai Electricity and Water Authority PJSC riporta risultati record nel primo semestre 2024.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates - Dubai Electricity and Water Authority PJSC has reported record-breaking financial results for the first half of 2024. The exact figures were not disclosed in the provided information.

news.headline: GenScript Biotech reports strong first half 2024 results with 43.5% revenue growth, 156% boost in cell therapy revenue, and 75.4% rise in gross profit. Enhancing commitment to ESG and sustainable development.
news.summary: Significant progress was noted in revenue and strategic initiatives across vital sectors, underscoring a deepened dedication to ESG and sustainable practices. The latest financial results were remarkable, with a substantial 43.5% surge in overall revenue. Noteworthy increases included a remarkable 156% surge in cell therapy revenue and a substantial 75.4% uptick in gross profit. These outcomes reflect strong momentum and the pursuit of sustainable growth.

news.headline: BillingPlatform ranked highest in ability to execute and scored highest in 4 of 5 use cases in Gartner's Magic Quadrant for Recurring Billing Applications.
news.summary: A recent report has shown that BillingPlatform, an enterprise revenue lifecycle management platform based in Denver, has achieved the highest placement in terms of ability to execute. The company also received the top scores in four out of five use cases outlined in the Critical Capabilities report. This recognition signifies BillingPlatform's strong performance and effectiveness in the market. The report, released on August 9, 2024, highlights the company's success and dominance in the industry.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. shares drop after posting Q2 earnings of $598.6M (-5% Y/Y) and cutting dividend by 40%. Adjusted EPS at $0.09 beats expectation.
news.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (NYSE:AQN) saw a decline in its shares after releasing its second-quarter FY24 financial results and announcing the sale of its renewable energy business. The company reported revenue of $598.60 million in Q2, a decrease of 5% year-over-year, falling short of the expected $625.00 million. However, its adjusted EPS of $0.09 surpassed the consensus of $0.08. Adjusted Funds from Operations showed a 12% increase year-over-year, reaching $167.9 million for the quarter. Algonquin also declared a third-quarter dividend for 2024 at $0.065 per share, marking a 40% reduction from the previous quarter.

news.headline: Ethereum (ETH) sees inflation in Q2 2024, adding 75,301 ETH after six quarters of deflation since late 2022. Shift noted.
news.summary: In Q2 of 2024, Ethereum (ETH) experienced a shift from a deflationary trend to an inflationary one by adding 75,301 ETH to the network. This marks a substantial change from the previous trend that had been observed since late 2022.

news.summary: Michigan's golf courses are set to benefit from a significant partnership as 100GROUP, a top FinTech provider offering business management software and payment processing services, becomes a Diamond Sponsor. This sponsorship is expected to drive innovation and growth in the industry, providing substantial support to Michigan's golf courses.

news.headline: Bitcoin Cash price rose 5.61% in 24 hours to $346.44, countering 13.0% loss over past week. All-time high: $3,785.82.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin Cash (BCH) has risen by 5.61% in the last 24 hours, reaching $346.44. This is in contrast to the previous week, during which it saw a 13.0% decline from $389.54 to its current value. The coin's all-time high currently stands at $3,785.82. news.headline: LBA Hospitality opens new TownePlace Suites by Marriott in Brunswick, Georgia, grand opening on June 25th.
news.summary: In Brunswick, Georgia, on August 9, 2024, LBA Hospitality, a leading hotel management company, marked the successful launch of the TownePlace Suites by Marriott. The grand opening of the newest hotel, owned by BPR Properties, was honored on June 25. This new addition signifies a milestone for LBA Hospitality as they expand their portfolio.

news.headline: Deadline to file claim in East Palestine Train Derailment Settlement is August 22, 2024; settlement amount is $600K.
news.summary: The deadline for submitting a claim in the East Palestine Train Derailment Settlement is August 22, 2024. A recent announcement from Kroll Settlement Administration in Philadelphia on August 9, 2024, emphasized the importance of filing claims promptly. The settlement offers a total of $600,000 for eligible claimants affected by the incident. Claimants are urged to act before the specified deadline to ensure their participation in the settlement process.

news.headline: Georgia Power & Georgia 811 release new PSA on Georgia 811 Day to promote digging safety, educate customers.
news.summary: Georgia Power and Georgia 811 have teamed up to launch a new public service announcement (PSA) campaign in preparation for 811 Day, focusing on educating customers about the necessity of having underground lines marked before any digging activities. The initiative, announced on Aug. 9, 2024, in Atlanta, aims to raise awareness about safe digging practices at home or work. This collaboration underscores the significance of preventing accidental damage to critical utility lines and reinforces the importance of dialing 811 before starting any digging project. The campaign underscores the potential risks associated with such activities and emphasizes the crucial role of marking underground lines. This proactive effort intends to inform a wide audience about the potential hazards and encourage compliance with safety protocols to mitigate the estimated 1,000 instances of damage to underground utilities that occur daily.

news.headline: i2 Group is increasing investment in intelligence analysis software due to growing demand from NATO forces, with double-digit growth.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in London and New York, i2 Group announced that their intelligence analytics software is experiencing a surge in popularity, particularly among NATO forces, as well as intelligence and law enforcement agencies. This high demand has propelled the company's growth into the double digits. i2 Group, a top provider of visual data analysis worldwide, is at the forefront of this industry trend.

news.headline: Rivulet Films' "Nutcrackers" featuring Ben Stiller to debut at Toronto International Film Festival on Sep 5.
news.summary: In Gilbert, Arizona, on August 9, 2024, Rivulet Entertainment Inc (Ticker: RIVF) shared news that the Toronto International Film Festival is set to commence on September 5 with the launch of Ben Stiller's comedy-drama "Nutcrackers," under the direction of David Gordon Green. This highly-anticipated world premiere will be a focal point of the festival's opening. The announcement was made by Rob Paris and Mike, marking a significant moment for cinema enthusiasts and industry professionals worldwide.

news.headline: Dogecoin's whale transactions increase, as experts predict a promising future due to notable price surge after 3 years.
news.summary: Amidst improved price action, transactions by Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) whales are increasing, stirring optimism among traders about the future of the leading meme coin. Recently, Dogecoin experienced a significant breakout in February 2024 after being confined within a narrow trading range for more than three years. The coin has been testing this breakout phase, leading to speculation about the possibility of a substantial rally in the near future. With Dogecoin trading above the 200-day exponential moving average (EMA) and striving to maintain its position above the 100-day EMA, the bullish sentiment in the market is further reinforced.Furthermore, Dogecoin's relative strength index (RSI) is currently below 45, indicating a significant potential for growth. Traders are closely monitoring the coin's performance as it continues to show promising signs. For more detailed information, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Lightview Capital sells Array to WCG, a clinical research solutions provider. Array founded in 2003. Deal announced on Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Lightview Capital (Lightview), a prominent private equity firm focusing on the lower middle market, revealed the successful sale of Array to WCG, a renowned global player in clinical research solutions. Established in 2003, Array stands as a prominent content engagement partner within the life sciences industry. This transaction signifies a significant step for both companies, solidifying WCG's position further in the market while providing Lightview with a profitable exit strategy. The acquisition highlights the continued growth and consolidation within the industry, showcasing the value of such deals for businesses looking to expand their reach and capabilities.

news.headline: STAr Sagittarius Series test software for semiconductors launched in 2001, integrates CV and IV measurements into one platform.
Crescent Communities sells Denver multifamily community to Equity Residential, marking a milestone in Colorado growth strategy.
news.summary: In a significant development for Crescent Communities' expansion plans in Colorado, the acquisition of White Fence Farm signifies a crucial step in their growth strategy. The transaction was completed on August 9, 2024, cementing Crescent Communities' position as a prominent player in the real estate market. Known for its expertise in developing and managing mixed-use communities, the company's move highlights its commitment to the Colorado region. This latest move underlines Crescent Communities' reputation as a leading real estate investor, with a focus on driving growth and innovation in the sector.

news.headline: Tevogen Bio's CEO reaffirms growth strategy, states Form S-1 unrelated to new issuance of dilutive securities.
news.summary: Tevogen Bio has confirmed that the registration statement is not associated with any undisclosed new issuances of dilutive securities.

news.headline: National 811 Day on Sunday reminds to call 811 before digging for safety; free service, prevents expensive repairs.
news.summary: National 811 Day is celebrated on August 11th to emphasize the significance of contacting 811 before starting any digging project, regardless of its size. By making a free call to 811, individuals can ensure their safety and avoid costly repairs. This initiative is particularly crucial in Oakland, California, where a single call can prevent accidents and damages. Remember to dial 811 before any excavation work to protect yourself and the community.

news.headline: US services sector shows growth in July with ISM Services PMI rising to 51.4%, easing recession fears. S&P Global Composite PMI at 54.3.
news.summary: In July, U.S. services sector business sentiment rebounded, with the ISM Services PMI increasing from 48.8% to 51.4%, surpassing expectations of hitting 51%. This growth allayed fears of a recession in the economy. The S&P Global survey also showed expansion, though at a slower pace than anticipated. The S&P Global Composite PMI dropped from 54.8 to 54.3, missing a projected increase to 55. The S&P Global Services PMI slipped from 55.3 to 55, falling short of the estimated 56. Subindices also showed improvements, with Business Activity rising to 54.5% and New Orders climbing to 52.4%. These positive numbers suggest a strengthening services sector.

news.headline: AirSculpt's stocks drop after Q2 revenues of $51 million missed estimates, and adjusted EPS fell to $0.09 from $0.13.
news.summary: Stock of AirSculpt Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AIRS) tumbled following the release of its second-quarter 2024 financial results, which also led to a reduction in its full-year outlook and unveiled changes in leadership last Friday. The company reported a revenue decline of 8.4% year-over-year to $51.004 million, missing the expected $55.26 million. Case volume dropped by 5.7% year-over-year to 3,949 for the quarter. Adjusted earnings per share stood at $0.09, down from $0.13 the previous year, surpassing the projected $0.04. Adjusted net income was $5.14 million, a decrease from $7.643 million in the prior year. The operating loss for the quarter was $4.981 million, as opposed to an operating income of $5.362 million. By the end of June, the company held $9.9 million in cash and equivalents. AIRS recorded $6.8 million in operating cash flow for the first half of the year, compared to $18.5 million in the same period a year ago. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cierto Tequila wins Spirit of the Year at 2024 USA Spirits Ratings.
news.summary: Cierto Tequila has been awarded the prestigious title of Spirit of the Year at the 2024 USA Spirits Ratings event in New York. This recognition highlights the exceptional quality of Cierto Tequila, making it stand out among other spirits in the industry. The award is a testament to the brand's dedication to producing top-notch tequila, with a focus on excellence in taste, craftsmanship, and overall experience. Winning this title at such a renowned event further solidifies Cierto Tequila's position as a leading player in the spirits market.

news.headline: Dow Jones up 300 points; Super Micro plunges on earnings. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Today, the stock market saw a significant rise with the Dow Jones climbing 300 points. However, shares of Super Micro, a partner of Nvidia, plummeted due to underwhelming earnings reports. This event was followed by live coverage provided by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Nikola's Q2 2024 results show $31.3M sales (+$15.9M YoY), 77 trucks produced (+44 YoY), stock soars on positive data.
news.summary: Shares of Nikola Corp (NASDAQ:NKLA) rose following the release of its fiscal Q2 2024 results. The company disclosed total sales of $31.3 million for the quarter, a significant increase from $15.4 million reported a year earlier, surpassing the analyst consensus of $24.7 million. Additionally, the adjusted EPS loss was $(2.67), an improvement from $(5.90) in the same period last year and beating the analyst consensus loss estimate of $(2.78). Nikola's truck production also saw considerable growth, with 77 trucks produced in the quarter compared to 33 in the previous year.

news.headline: Traders resume yen-dollar carry trade as Bank of Japan pledges no rate hikes during market volatility; yen tumbles 1.9% to over 147 per dollar.
news.summary: Following dovish signals from the Bank of Japan, traders have reignited their bullish bets on the yen-dollar carry trade strategy. The Japanese yen, as indicated by the Invesco CurrencyShares Japanese Yen Trust (NYSE:FXY), plunged over 1.9% to over 147 per dollar by 10:00 a.m. in New York after BOJ Deputy Governor Shinichi Uchida suggested no interest rate hikes amidst market volatility. Uchida emphasized the need to sustain current monetary easing amidst significant financial market fluctuations, expressing caution towards raising interest rates due to emerging factors. This move has prompted speculation on the resurgence of the yen-dollar carry trade strategy. Additionally, Mortgage Rates have dropped to 15-month lows, triggering higher demand in the housing market following hints of rate cuts from the Federal Reserve.
